description: Couchbase MCP Server - Enable AI agents to connect to and interact with Couchbase clusters.
name: io.github.couchbase/mcp-server-couchbase

environmentVariables.description: Couchbase connection string. Required for connecting to the cluster.
environmentVariables.name: CB_CONNECTION_STRING

environmentVariables.description: Couchbase database username. Required for basic authentication.
environmentVariables.name: CB_USERNAME

environmentVariables.description: Couchbase database password. Required for basic authentication.
environmentVariables.name: CB_PASSWORD

environmentVariables.description: Couchbase CA certificate path. Required for TLS authentication in non Capella clusters.
environmentVariables.name: CB_CA_CERT_PATH

environmentVariables.description: Couchbase client certificate path. Required for mTLS authentication.
environmentVariables.name: CB_CLIENT_CERT_PATH

environmentVariables.description: Couchbase client key path. Required for mTLS authentication.
environmentVariables.name: CB_CLIENT_KEY_PATH

environmentVariables.description: Couchbase read only mode. Set to true to disable write operations across both KV and query. KV write tools are not loaded and SQL++ queries that modify data are blocked. Set to false to allow data modification queries and tools.
environmentVariables.name: CB_MCP_READ_ONLY_MODE

environmentVariables.description: Transport mode for the server (stdio, http or sse). Default is stdio
environmentVariables.name: CB_MCP_TRANSPORT

environmentVariables.description: Host to run the MCP server on (default: 127.0.0.1). Used only for HTTP and SSE transport modes.
environmentVariables.name: CB_MCP_HOST

environmentVariables.description: Port to run the MCP server on (default: 8000). Used only for HTTP and SSE transport modes.
environmentVariables.name: CB_MCP_PORT

environmentVariables.description: Tools to disable. Accepts comma-separated tool names (e.g., 'tool_1,tool_2') or a file path containing one tool name per line.
environmentVariables.name: CB_MCP_DISABLED_TOOLS

environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated tool names that require user confirmation before execution. Also accepts a file path containing one tool name per line. Requires the MCP client to support elicitation.
environmentVariables.name: CB_MCP_CONFIRMATION_REQUIRED_TOOLS

environmentVariables.description: Logging level for the MCP server. One of off, debug, info, warning, error. Use 'off' to disable logging entirely. Invalid values fall back to info. Default is info.
environmentVariables.name: CB_MCP_LOG_LEVEL

environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated list of log destinations. Allowed values: stderr, file. Include 'file' to write per-level log files; include 'stderr' to write to the console. Default is stderr.
environmentVariables.name: CB_MCP_LOG_SINKS

environmentVariables.description: Base path for the per-level log files. One rotating file is written per level (e.g. mcp_server.info.log, mcp_server.error.log). Only used when 'file' is in CB_MCP_LOG_SINKS. Default is mcp_server.log.
environmentVariables.name: CB_MCP_LOG_FILE

environmentVariables.description: Maximum size in bytes per per-level log file before it rotates. Default is 1048576 (1 MB).
environmentVariables.name: CB_MCP_LOG_MAX_BYTES

environmentVariables.description: JWKS endpoint of the identity provider used to verify bearer JWT signatures. Required to enable OAuth, along with CB_MCP_OAUTH_JWT_ISSUER and CB_MCP_OAUTH_JWT_AUDIENCE. Only honored when CB_MCP_TRANSPORT=http.
environmentVariables.name: CB_MCP_OAUTH_JWT_JWKS_URI

environmentVariables.description: Expected JWT 'iss' claim value. Also advertised as the authorization server in Protected Resource Metadata when CB_MCP_OAUTH_MCP_BASE_URL is set. Required to enable OAuth.
environmentVariables.name: CB_MCP_OAUTH_JWT_ISSUER

environmentVariables.description: Expected JWT 'aud' claim value. Required to enable OAuth.
environmentVariables.name: CB_MCP_OAUTH_JWT_AUDIENCE

environmentVariables.description: JWT signing algorithm. One of RS256/384/512, ES256/384/512, PS256/384/512. Default is RS256.
environmentVariables.name: CB_MCP_OAUTH_JWT_ALGORITHM

environmentVariables.description: Public base URL of this MCP server. When set, the server publishes RFC 9728 Protected Resource Metadata at <base_url>/.well-known/oauth-protected-resource/mcp so PRM-aware clients can discover the authorization server. Optional.
environmentVariables.name: CB_MCP_OAUTH_MCP_BASE_URL
